title: Mini Origins
description: Mod that aims to add small creatures to the Origins mod
body:
## Description Mini Origins is a mod that aims to add small creature origins to the already existing [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com). The general theme of the creatures are that you will become smaller than a human with additional buffs and nerfs. The mini origins aim to be close to vanilla so that they are not overpowered. Every buff will have a nerf to balance the origin out. This mod is great for players that want to explore Minecraft while being smaller than a block, it opens lots of new house ideas and it's fun being smaller when playing with friends. Being smaller makes you feel more cozy, house entrances and rooms can be complex due to being smaller. ## Content Below is a list of all current ingame origins and planned origins. **Fennec**
=Smaller, You are a block smaller.
+Agile, You are faster than regular humans due to your weight.
+Leap, You can leap into a direction.
+Acrobatics, You never take fall damage, no matter from which height you fall.
-Fragile, You have 2 hearts less due to being lightweight.
-Tiny Head, Your head is too small and weak for any helmet.
**Singapura - Planned (WIP)**
=Smaller, Below 0.25 blocks so you can walk below slabs **Squirrel - Planned**
=Smaller, Below 0.25 blocks so you can walk below slabs
